summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DK Kinetic Digital LLP corporate website with GST Invoice Management System. All backend APIs, frontend functionality, and admin portal working perfectly with successful integration.
passed_tests: Contact form submission (/api/contact POST) - 200 OK with proper response
Contact form validation with invalid data - 422 validation errors
Contact data retrieval (/api/contacts GET) - 200 OK with data
Homepage loading with all sections (Hero, Services, About, Tech, Industries, Contact)
Navigation bar with all required links
Contact form frontend submission with success message display
Admin login page loading at /admin route
Admin login form rendering with email/password inputs and proper data-testids
Admin portal UI elements (heading, GST text, back link)
Back to website navigation from admin portal
Success toast notifications after form submission
